one_time_description: Legal Settlement of $391,433 recognized as revenue in 2022
economic_notes: 4C Farms Limited Partnership transferred from Cowessess Ventures LP to First Nation. Chief Red Bear Children's Lodge commenced operations April 1, 2021. Farming income of $1,951,796 reported. Cowessess Ventures LP received $1,789,953 government grant post year-end. Wind, urban, and energy development LPs under Cowessess Ventures LP.
notes: Fiscal year is 2022, not 2024. Province is Saskatchewan. Large increase in revenue and deferred revenue due to Chief Red Bear Children's Lodge (family and child services) commencing operations April 1, 2021 with $22.6M in restricted project management cash. Contribution to TLE of $2,686,500 recorded as other expense. 11 consolidated subsidiaries including 4C Farms LP newly transferred. 2 GBEs accounted for by modified equity method (Cowessess Ventures LP and Cowessess Ventures Ltd). Restricted cash totals approximately $27.4M including CMHC reserves and project management cash. Deferred revenue increased significantly from $7.9M to $25.2M. Legal settlement of $391,433 is a one-time item.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
